name: skillsmith
description: Create, test, and share Claude Code skills. The npm registry for AI agent skills.

tools.name: skillsmith_init
tools.description: Scaffold a new Claude Code skill from a template (basic | advanced | mcp)

tools.name: skillsmith_test
tools.description: Validate a skill directory against the Claude Code skill spec

tools.name: skillsmith_list
tools.description: Browse the built-in skill catalog, optionally filtered by category

tools.name: skillsmith_validate_spec
tools.description: Check raw SKILL.md content for spec compliance without writing to disk
